basicDetails.schemeName: Priyank Pathak Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture (4th Year) Students
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Priyank Pathak Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture (4th Year) Students” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. in Agriculture who are in their fourth year of study, by awarding them a monthly scholarship for one year.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. in Agriculture who are in their fourth year of study, by awarding them a monthly scholarship of ₹ 800/- for one year.

children.text: The “Priyank Pathak Scholarship for B.Sc. Agriculture (4th Year) Students” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to meritorious students pursuing a B.Sc. in Agriculture who are in their fourth year of study, by awarding them a monthly scholarship for one year.

Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments.

applicationProcess.process_md: Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the selected students receive the scholarship payments.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the 4th year of the B.Sc. Agriculture program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. 1. The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The applicant must be enrolled in the 4th year of the B.Sc. Agriculture program at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
The scholarship is awarded for a duration of one year only.
